description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a matte teal and light blue color scheme. The front features bold, angular silver typography and a stylized graphic of a flexed arm with a lightning bolt, suggesting energy or strength. The can's top is metallic gray with a standard pull tab for opening. On one side, a detailed nutrition facts panel is visible, printed in white and light blue text. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible condensation or wetness. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or convenience store shelves.
description: A tall, teal and blue aluminum can with bold silver graphics and a flexed arm illustration, featuring a metallic pull tab top and a modern, energetic design.
description_view_0: The can is shown with a partial view of the bold silver typography and the lower part of the flexed arm graphic.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front, displaying the full 'BIG BOOST' text and the prominent flexed arm with a lightning bolt.
description_view_2: The side of the can is visible, showing the nutrition facts panel and part of the graphic design.
description_view_3: The can is rotated to show mostly the nutrition facts panel, with minimal graphic elements visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold, angular silver typography and a stylized flexed arm with a lightning bolt, set against a matte teal and light blue background. The design is modern and energetic, with clean lines and a focus on strength and vitality.
